name: Beet Jelly
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the beet juice, lemon juice, and pectin in a large pot.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium-high heat for 1 minute.
3. Gradually add the 7 cups of sugar while stirring continuously until the mixture reaches a rolling boil. Boil hard for an additional 2 minutes.
4. Remove from the heat and carefully stir in the raspberry Jell-O package until dissolved.
5. Pour the jelly into sterilized bottles and seal tightly.
